display_text: Clinkz Aghanim's Shard: Burning Barrage allows Clinkz to channel and shoot multiple piercing arrows in a direction, hitting all enemies and applying attack modifiers. This upgrade transforms Clinkz into a potent area denial and wave-clear hero, countering grouped enemy formations and enabling sustained teamfight damage.
search_text: Clinkz Aghanim Shard Burning Barrage area denial wave-clear teamfight damage attack modifiers

display_text: Clinkz Aghanim's Scepter: Increases the health of Skeleton Archers spawned by Skeleton Walk. This upgrade enhances Clinkz's push potential and survivability during sieges, countering wave-clear abilities and providing sustained map pressure.
search_text: Clinkz Aghanim Scepter Skeleton Walk Skeleton Archers push survivability siege map pressure
